## 2026-01-27

### Changes

- Adds pause/resume functionality

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

| Name  | Version |
| ----- | ------- |
| Xcode | >= 16   |
| iOS   | >= 13   |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/atomicfi/ios-sdk/compare/3.26.1...3.27.0
